message:
feat(abi): centralize pthread symbol caching, harden policy borrows, and re-enable runtime signal

pthread_abi.rs:
- Add atomic caches for pthread function pointers (create, join,
  detach, self, equal) with direct libc.so.6 handle loading via dlopen
- Introduce resolve_host_symbol_via_libc_handle() for symbol resolution
  directly from the loaded libc handle
- Consolidate five pthread resolvers into centralized
  resolve_cached_host_thread_symbol() helper, eliminating duplicate
  resolution patterns

runtime_policy.rs:
- Add defensive try_borrow_mut() checks in apply_decision_contract()
  and record_last_explainability() to prevent RefCell borrow panics
  in concurrent access scenarios

startup_abi.rs:
- Re-enable signal_runtime_ready() calls in host_delegate_main_wrapper,
  startup_phase0_impl, and __libc_start_main startup paths, reversing
  the LD_PRELOAD reentrancy deadlock workaround from cec8d00 now that
  the symbol resolution is deadlock-free

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
